title: Trophill Gardens
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Trophill Gardens''' were a small garden park located in [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant's]] [[East Minor]]. The Gardens included mazes.<ref name="Shield of lies">''[[Shield of Lies]]''</ref>
